title: Query D1 from Python Workers
excerpt: description: Learn how to query D1 from a Python Worker image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Learn how to query D1 from a Python Worker The Cloudflare Workers platform supports [multiple languages](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/languages/), including TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and Python. This guide shows you how to query a D1 database from [Python](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/languages/python/) and deploy your application globally.
